productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunar Flow Black Casual Shoes
description: Get ready to move in style with these Lunar Flow shoes from nike. The sleek design of these shoes coupled with its light weight makes it a great buy. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.UpperSynthetic uppers for protection and durabilityCut details that act as design features and allow for greater breathability on the toeboxLace-ups for snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortBrand name appliqued on the tongue and printed behind the collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day comfortFull-length pylon midsole for cushioningOutsoleOutsole with waffle shaped lugsShoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
